description:
Whether you're a professional chef or an aspiring home cook, this kitchen cleaver knife is a valuable addition to your culinary arsenal. Experience the perfect blend of style, functionality, and durability with our Chopping Knife.

 

Product Specification:

Total length: 12\'/30.3 cm

Blade length: 6.5\'/16.3 cm

Blade width: 2\'/5 cm

Blade thickness: 0.08\'/2mm

Weight: 7.44 oz/211 g

Material: 5Cr15 High Carbon Stainless Steel

 

Maintenance Tips

√Please keep it dry and clean after each use, and it can be oiled regularly to prevent rust.

√This high-carbon stainless steel boning knife is not recommended for machine washing, which may damage the sharpness of the blade.

√This knife is very sharp and heavy, please keep it away from children and use it with care.


Qulajoy focuses on quality, craftsmanship and details, just to let you enjoy the cooking time and experience the fun of cooking.
